subcodes.first_line: A remembrance from Our presence unto him who sought guidance in the days of his Lord, and attained unto the lights of the Throne, and was of them that drew nigh [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدنا الی الذی استهدی فی ایام ربه و فاز بانوار العرش و کان من المقبلین
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @call to action, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @suffering and imprisonment, @love of God
